title: PojavLauncher Optimized
description: The modpack consists of carefully selected mods focused on PojavLauncher performance.
body:
PojavLauncher Optimized greatly speeds up Minecraft with modern performance mods. The mods included in the modpack have been carefully selected due to which it gives better stability and increase in fps than most other modpacks.

![The background is a beautiful view of minecraft, on the top left is the PojavLauncher Optimized logo, on the bottom left is the PojavLauncher logo, in the middle it was written 96fps, but it became 284fps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/defef391e38cf15d012f0a3dbc875187ae7c2012.png)

PojavLauncher Optimized is a simple mod pack designed to speed up Minecraft without significantly affecting the game's vanilla graphics.

PojavLauncher Optimized is a fast growing modpack and is rapidly moving to new versions.
